## Problem

What practical problem should this solve?

## Proposal

What should change?

## Alternatives

What simpler or safer alternatives should be considered?

## Boundaries

For this project, proposed features must avoid exploitation, fuzzing, login bypass, brute force, and high-volume crawling.
